Protein names: 27S pre-rRNA (guanosine(2922)-2'-O)-methyltransferase (EC 2.1.1.167) (2'-O-ribose RNA methyltransferase SPB1) (AdoMet-dependent rRNA methyltransferase SPB1) (S-adenosyl-L-methionine-dependent methyltransferase) (Suppressor of PAB1 protein 1)
Protein families: Class I-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily, RNA methyltransferase RlmE family, SPB1 subfamily
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the class I-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily. RNA methyltransferase RlmE family. SPB1 subfamily. {ECO:0000255|HAMAP-Rule:MF_03163}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=guanosine(2922) in 27S pre-rRNA + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 2'-O-methylguanosine(2922) in 27S pre-rRNA + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:42724, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:10200, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:10201, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:74269, ChEBI:CHEBI:74445; EC=2.1.1.167; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:14636587};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Required for proper assembly of pre-ribosomal particles during the biogenesis of the 60S ribosomal subunit. Specifically methylates the guanosine in position 2922 of the 25S rRNA at the stage of 27S pre-rRNA maturation. Also methylates the uridine in position 2921 in the absence of methylation of this residue guided by snoRNA snR52 at the stage of 35S pre-rRNA maturation. {ECO:0000255|HAMAP-Rule:MF_03163, ECO:0000269|PubMed:10556316, ECO:0000269|PubMed:14636587, ECO:0000269|PubMed:15546625}.
